source: Tier-1 read-only gap audit (frontend/scripts/orchestration) — done directly by Tier-1 because the ollamas fleet failed to read these large units (16/66 read, 0 findings) AND a classifier outage blocked Claude sub-agent dispatch. Read-only, evidence-first.
coverageNote: Reliably read by Tier-1: src/lib/apiClient.ts, scripts/agent-dispatch.mjs, scripts/combo-bench.mjs, orchestration/bin/lib/optimize.ts. Remaining frontend components + more scripts/orchestration bins + vitest for A9-tests to finish when classifier (Agent/Bash) recovers.

findings.name: request() timeout disabled when caller passes a signal
findings.symptom: request() arms a 30s timeout via setTimeout(()=>ctrl.abort(),timeoutMs) (line 80) but the fetch uses `signal: opts.signal ?? ctrl.signal` (line 91). When a caller supplies opts.signal, fetch listens to THAT signal, not ctrl — so ctrl.abort() on timeout does nothing and the request can hang past timeoutMs (until the caller's own signal fires, if ever).
findings.fix: Combine: signal: opts.signal ? AbortSignal.any([opts.signal, ctrl.signal]) : ctrl.signal.

findings.name: optimalConfig dead branch
findings.symptom: `if (modelVramGb(model) >= 18 && num_ctx > 8192) num_ctx = 8192` is unreachable: num_ctx max assigned above is 8192, so the big-model ctx-reduction never fires (a 30B model never gets ctx reduced). Intent not realized / dead code.
findings.fix: Cap big models lower (e.g. num_ctx=4096 when modelVramGb>=18), or remove the dead branch.

findings.name: benchmark counts infra-failed (demo/timeout/parse-fail) runs as model-incorrect
findings.symptom: cache[model][task] = {correct: r.blob.includes(answer), ms, demo}. The `demo` flag is captured but NEVER used in any rate/winner computation (lines 75-94). A run that fell to demo, timed out, or failed to parse yields blob without the answer -> correct:false -> counted as the MODEL being wrong, not excluded/retried. So champion/combination selection can be skewed by infra flakiness rather than model capability (same failure class observed live in the Faz11 fleet: non-reading units silently scored as clean).
findings.fix: Exclude or retry demo/error runs before computing rate (e.g. skip tasks where demo||!blob, or re-dispatch up to N times), and surface excluded counts.
findings.evidence: Code combo-bench.mjs:69 captures demo; :75-94 rate/correctCount/winner never reference demo or dispatch errors.

clean.note: SSE parse correctly keys on data:+ev.type (no event: bug); demo-detection + verdict sound; writable-root injection correct. No functional bug.
scoreModel/scoreAll/selectBest correct (correctness-gate 0.7, vram-fit, min-max tok normalize, lexicographic tie-break). Only dead branch G-002.
